ocr_findings.description: Learning-point sidebar box (学習のポイント) text captured inline rather than as a distinct callout, but all text is present

reviewer_notes: Lesson 11-02 'コンピュータの5つの役割' page. Body paragraphs and the '5つの役割' advisory box all captured correctly. Arrow notation '入力→演算→出力' preserved. The five-role list (演算/制御/記憶/入力/出力) present. No missing text or character errors. Page number 378 not shown in OCR but is minor cosmetic omission.
